title: Deploy: church-website-wp@1.0.0 deployed to production
text: WordPress church website initial release deployed to shiloh-web-01 by calvin-hargrove.

title: Alert: MySQL query latency spike on shiloh-db-01
text: Average MySQL query time reached 4.2s on shiloh-db-01. Monitor 2003 triggered.

title: SSL cert auto-renewed for shilohbaptistbiloxi.org
text: Certbot successfully renewed Let's Encrypt certificate via Cloudflare DNS challenge. Next expiry 2027-03-10.

title: Alert: Disk usage > 85% on shiloh-db-01
text: Disk /dev/sda1 on shiloh-db-01 reached 87% utilization. Sermon MP3 backups should be archived to media server.

title: Deploy: church-website-webflow@2.1.0 deployed to production
text: Webflow embed script and sermon archive CMS collection updated. Deployed by calvin-hargrove.

title: Alert: Stripe webhook failures on giving portal
text: 5 Stripe webhook failures detected in 5 minutes. church-giving-portal@1.0.0. Webhook signing secret may have rotated.

title: Info: WordPress plugin updates applied
text: Calvin applied plugin updates: Wordfence 7.11.4, Contact Form 7 5.9.6, WP Mail SMTP 3.11.0. Site health check passed.

title: Deploy: church-giving-portal@1.0.0 launched to production
text: Stripe giving portal for Shiloh Baptist Church went live. Tithe.ly migration complete. Deployed by calvin-hargrove.

title: Alert: PHP-FPM worker pool exhausted on shiloh-web-01
text: PHP-FPM pm.max_children reached during Sunday service livestream. 23 concurrent connections. Site returned 502.

title: Info: Kubernetes node shiloh-worker-2 added to cluster
text: Third node shiloh-worker-2 (10.0.2.12) joined the shiloh-web cluster. WordPress pods rebalanced.

title: Alert: WP Cron missed scheduled run
text: WordPress cron last_run exceeds 3600s on shiloh-web-01. wp_scheduled_delete and wp_update_plugins events overdue.

title: Deploy: church-website-wp@1.2.1 hotfix deployed
text: Hotfix for undefined index in sermon-archive.php and broken audio URL generation. Deployed to production.

title: Info: MySQL backup completed successfully
text: Automated nightly MySQL dump to shiloh-media-01:/backups/db. Size: 412MB. Duration: 4m 12s.

title: Alert: Nginx returning 504 Gateway Timeout
text: Nginx upstream PHP-FPM timed out on shiloh-web-01. 12 requests affected. Resolved after php-fpm restart.

title: Info: Cloudflare cache purged after Webflow deploy
text: Calvin manually purged Cloudflare cache for shilohbaptistbiloxi.org after church-website-webflow@2.1.0 deploy.

title: Alert: Media server nginx down on shiloh-media-01
text: nginx service on shiloh-media-01 stopped responding. Sermon audio streaming unavailable for 8 minutes.

title: Info: Redis cache eviction rate elevated on shiloh-web-01
text: Redis eviction rate reached 3.2% during sermon page crawl by church media archivist bot.

title: Deploy: church-website-webflow@2.2.0 staged for review
text: New Webflow deploy with Sermon Archive CMS migration and hero image optimization. Awaiting Pastor Wilkins review.

title: Info: Let's Encrypt wildcard cert issued for shilohbaptistbiloxi.org
text: Certbot issued wildcard *.shilohbaptistbiloxi.org cert via Cloudflare DNS-01 challenge. Expires 2027-03-10.

title: Alert: MySQL slave replication lag > 60s
text: MySQL replication lag on shiloh-db-01 reached 74s during large sermon import batch operation.
